forge-teams: [{"id":"nocturnal-knights","name":"Nocturnal Knights","abbr":"NK","color":"#534AB7","colorLight":"#AFA9EC","type":"global","nkAlignment":"base","isDefault":true,"description":"Dark urban anti-heroes operating in the shadows between crime and justice.","motto":"We are the dark between the lights.","origin":"Founded by Kareem Carter after surviving a government black-site experiment. The Knights exist because the organization responsible is still operating — and no legitimate hero was stopping them."},{"id":"team-1779426722159","name":"The Black Order","abbr":"TBO","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","type":"global","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"A secretive coalition of international operatives, united to combat threats that transcend borders and governments.","motto":"Silence is strength","origin":"Founded by enigmatic strategist Rachel Kim in the aftermath of a global pandemic, The Black Order began as an elite cell responding to catastrophic events. Tragedy and hardship forged them into a team, united by their desire for justice and haunted by the ghosts of their past.","logoSeed":3,"isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779919573404}]
